prestazioni: Engine: Theta II 2.0L Turbo GDI (G4KH) with a forged internals build including Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a K1 Technologies billet crankshaft to handle 400+ WHP reliably. Pair with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 4-inch aluminum intercooler piping kit from Vibrant Performance for optimized airflow.

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (OS G300-1.5W) for the front differential to eliminate torque steer, paired with a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 Daily clutch kit (organic/copper hybrid disc) and a lightweight aluminum flywheel (11.5 lbs) to improve throttle response. Replace the stock half-shafts with Driveshaft Shop 3.5-inch chromoly axles for durability under high torque loads.

Suspension: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (part #HY103) with custom valving for the Elantra N’s 5-link rear suspension, paired with SuperPro poly bushings (part #SPF0116K) for the rear subframe to reduce deflection. Add a Whiteline front sway bar (24mm adjustable) and a Cusco rear sway bar (22mm) to fine-tune understeer. Use Hardrace adjustable camber plates (front) and rear camber arms to achieve -2.5° front and -2.0° rear for optimal tire wear and cornering grip.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Pandem) for the Elantra N, including carbon fiber front canards, side skirts, and a duckbill rear spoiler. Pair with a custom 3D-printed diffuser from Maxton Design (model #MX1000) to reduce drag and increase downforce. Add a Seibon carbon fiber hood (part #HY-ELAN18-HOOD) with a functional vent to improve heat extraction from the Garrett turbo.

Wheels: Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +30mm front and 18x10.5 +35mm rear wheels (matte bronze finish) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/35/18 front, 275/35/18 rear). Use Project Kics R40 6x139.7 lug nuts (extended thread) to ensure proper fitment with the widebody kit.

Interior: Recaro Sportster CS seats (part #29109) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses for driver and passenger. Replace the stock steering wheel with a Momo Prototipo (350mm, suede) and add a custom carbon fiber shift knob from 034Motorsport (for the 8-speed wet DCT). Install a Defi BF Advance gauge cluster (oil temp, oil pressure, boost) in a custom A-pillar mount from AEM.
